title: Property Consultant - Square Yards - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Square Yards - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
